name: Structured Data Extraction Benchmark v1
description: Tests accuracy of data extraction agents against 15 unstructured text samples requiring structured JSON output with exact field matching.
sourceDescription: All text samples and expected outputs are synthetic. Designed to test structured extraction across common document types (invoices, resumes, recipes, etc.).

Classic Margherita Pizza

Ingredients:
- 1 lb pizza dough
- 1/2 cup San Marzano tomato sauce
- 8 oz fresh mozzarella, sliced
- Fresh basil leaves
- 2 tbsp extra virgin olive oil
- Salt to taste

Preheat oven to 500°F. Stretch dough, add sauce, cheese, bake 10-12 minutes. Top with basil and oil.

Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones
